_comment: Shared, committed. Impeccable per-edit design detector: runs after Edit/Write/MultiEdit on UI files and surfaces findings as advisory reminders (non-blocking). Uses the repo's committed skill via relative path so it is portable across machines. Scoped rules live in .impeccable/config.json. This is IN ADDITION to the required /impeccable critique PR gate (AGENTS.md). Machine-local overrides go in the gitignored .claude/settings.local.json.
